narrative_hint: ALB had an unusually slow lap on lap 1.0, losing 8.1s compared to their average in that stint.
headline: Albon's Lap 1 Struggle
caption: Alex Albon's opening lap was unusually slow at 94.507s, losing 8.1 seconds compared to his median stint pace of 86.438s.

headline: ALB's Lap 43 Slowdown
caption: Alexander Albon's lap 43 clocked in at 86.038s, a significant 2.4s slower than his median lap time of 83.638s for that stint. This unusual slowdown impacted his race pace.
